2606.25656.title: Is GraphRAG Needed? From Basic RAG to Graph-/Agentic Solutions with Context Optimization
2606.25656.paper_summary: As advanced RAG variants like GraphRAG and Agentic RAG emerge, one leading question is when and how to use them. Here, we introduce a framework for different RAG scenarios evaluation and comparison on semi-structured knowledge bases, including regular RAG, GraphRAG, Modular RAG and Agentic RAG. We provide implementation for 9 standardized RAG scenarios, and conduct experiments for a comprehensive comparison. These scenarios are designed for real use cases regarding data and domain restrictions, spanning from simple document-based retrieval to advanced features such as hybrid text-graph retrieval, integration with computed or pre-defined domain knowledge graphs, agentic multi-step planning, and agent-graph integration. Besides, we present a novel context engineering method for GraphRAG and Agentic RAG, addressing the context/memory overflow issues, efficiently managing text and graph retrievals with new representations and agentic loop design, leading to 19%-53% reduction on token usage. Moreover, further analysis identifies a retrieval-generation gap where expanded retrieval does not proportionally improve generation quality, suggesting retrieval-oriented metrics overstate advanced retrieval benefits. This work provides data-driven insights on when and how to use them for building production-ready intelligent RAG systems.
2606.25656.paper_summary_zh: 隨著像 GraphRAG 和 Agentic RAG 這樣的先進 RAG 變體的出現，一個主要問題是何時以及如何使用它們。<lb/>在這裡，我們介紹了一個框架，用於在半結構化知識庫上評估和比較不同的 RAG 場景，包括常規 RAG、GraphRAG、模組化 RAG 和 Agentic RAG。<lb/>我們提供了 9 種標準化 RAG 場景的實現，並進行實驗以進行全面比較。<lb/>這些場景旨在針對數據和領域限制的實際用例，涵蓋從簡單的基於文檔的檢索到先進功能，例如混合文本-圖形檢索、與計算或預定義的領域知識圖譜的整合、代理多步規劃和代理-圖形整合。<lb/>此外，我們提出了一種新穎的上下文工程方法，用於 GraphRAG 和 Agentic RAG，解決了上下文/記憶溢出問題，通過新的表示和代理循環設計有效管理文本和圖形檢索，導致標記使用量減少 19%-53%。<lb/>此外，進一步分析確定了一個檢索-生成差距，即擴展檢索並不成比例地提高生成質量，這表明以檢索為導向的指標高估了先進檢索的好處。<lb/>這項工作提供了數據驅動的見解，說明何時以及如何使用它們來構建生產就緒的智能 RAG 系統。
2606.25656.author: Long Chen et.al.
2606.25656.authors: Long Chen, Ryan Razkenari, Yuxuan Zhou, Yuan Tian, Rahul Ghosh, Venkatesh Pappakrishnan, Disha Ahuja, Vidya Sagar Ravipati
